name: Quality issue
about: Report a bug or request an improvement with clear scope and acceptance criteria

## Problem

Describe what is wrong or missing in 1-3 sentences.

## Context / Impact

Describe who is affected and why this matters.

## Steps to Reproduce (bug only)

1. 
2. 
3. 

For feature requests, write `N/A`.

## Actual Behavior

Describe what currently happens.

## Expected Behavior

Describe what should happen instead.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] 
- [ ] 

## Additional Information

Paste any supporting evidence here:
- Stack traces / logs
- Screenshots / videos
- Related issues / PRs
- Environment details (OS, RuneLite version, plugin version)

## Notes / Constraints

Capture scope constraints and non-goals only:
- Out-of-scope items
- Backward-compatibility constraints
- Performance/security/compliance constraints
